info.name: LogAI_CAMS_API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Log.AI-CAMS CMS system.

Includes:
- **Auth**: Login, Logout, Profile, Refresh Token, Change Password
- **Brand**: CRUD operations for Brand management
- **Users**: User management — list, get, create, update, toggle status, reset password, assign brand/store
- **Stores**: Store management — list, get, create, update, delete, toggle status
- **Spaces**: Space management — list, get, create, update, delete, toggle status

**Variables:**
- `baseUrl` — API base URL (e.g., https://localhost:7001)
- `accessToken` — Bearer token (auto-saved after login)

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for CMS (Login, Logout, Get Profile, Refresh Token, Change Password). Base path: /api/auth

request.description: Login to CMS. Returns Result<AuthResponse> with accessToken, expiresAt, roles. On success, accessToken is saved to collection variable for other requests.
Logout from CMS. Clears refresh token in DB and cookie. Requires valid access token. Returns Result (no data).
Get current user profile. Returns Result<ProfileResponse> (email, userId, firstName, lastName, phoneNumber, avatarPath, roles).
Refresh access token. Uses refresh token from HttpOnly cookie. Expired access token in header is allowed. Returns Result<AuthResponse>. Save new accessToken from response if needed.
Change password for logged-in user. Requires valid access token. Body: currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword. Returns Result (no data).

item.name: Brand
item.description: Brand management endpoints for Log.AI-CAMS CMS. Base path: /api/brands

query.description: Search by name, website, industry, primaryContactName, legalName, email, phone. Use search instead of filter by industry
Sort field: name | industry | createdat | updatedat

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.

Returns a paginated list of brands.

**Query params:**
- `page` / `pageSize`: pagination
- `search`: searches name, website, industry, primaryContactName, legalName, email, phone (use instead of separate industry filter)
- `sortBy`: `name` | `industry` | `createdat` | `updatedat`
- `isAscending`: sort direction
- `status`: filter by EntityStatusEnum
- `createdFrom` / `createdTo`: filter by date range

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "currentPage": 1,
  "pageSize": 10,
  "totalItems": 2,
  "totalPages": 1,
  "hasPrevious": false,
  "hasNext": false,
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
      "name": "Tech Brand",
      "logoUrl": "https://localhost:7001/uploads/brands/tech-brand-abc123.png",
      "industry": "Retail",
      "primaryContactName": "John Doe",
      "contactEmail": "contact@techbrand.com",
      "contactPhone": "0123456789",
      "createdAt": "2025-01-15T08:00:00Z",
      "updatedAt": "2025-02-01T10:30:00Z",
      "createdBy": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001",
      "updatedBy": null,
      "status": 1
    }
  ],
  "isSuccess": true,
  "message": "Brand retrieved successfully",
  "errors": null,
  "errorCode": null
}

response.name: 403 Forbidden

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager (own brand), StoreManager (own brand).

Returns full brand detail including description and currentSubscriptionId.

**Response 403:** Correct role but different brand ID.
**Response 404:** Brand not found.

formdata.description: Optional. Image file (.jpg .jpeg .png .gif .webp .bmp .svg), max 5 MB. Filename must not contain invalid OS characters. Select file manually in Postman.
Optional. Valid phone number: 7–15 digits total; supports +, (), -, spaces. E.g.: +84901234567, 0901234567, +1 (800) 555-0100.
Optional. Valid email format for IoT alerts.
Optional. Max 250 chars. For B2B invoicing.
Optional. Max 50 chars. Tax identification number.
Optional. Valid Windows timezone ID (NOT IANA). E.g.: SE Asia Standard Time, UTC, Singapore Standard Time, Pacific Standard Time. Default: SE Asia Standard Time (UTC+7).

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.

**Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data` (set automatically by Postman).

**Logo:** Enable the `logo` field and select a file manually — do NOT set Content-Type header manually.

**Validation errors (400):**
- `name` empty → required
- `name` > 200 chars
- `description` > 2000 chars
- `website` invalid URL (must be absolute http/https)
- `industry` > 100 chars
- `contactEmail` invalid email format
- `contactPhone` invalid phone format (must be 7–15 digits; supports +, (), -, spaces)
- `primaryContactName` > 200 chars
- `technicalContactEmail` invalid email format
- `legalName` > 250 chars
- `taxCode` > 50 chars
- `billingAddress` > 500 chars
- `defaultTimeZone` not a valid Windows timezone ID
- `logo` wrong file type (allowed: .jpg .jpeg .png .gif .webp .bmp .svg)
- `logo` > 5 MB
- `logo` filename contains invalid characters

**422:** Brand name already exists.

response.name: 201 Created
400 Validation Failed
403 Forbidden
422 Duplicate Name

formdata.description: Optional. New logo replaces old one after commit. Select file manually.
Optional. Valid phone number: 7–15 digits total; supports +, (), -, spaces. E.g.: +84901234567, 0901234567.
Optional. Valid Windows timezone ID (NOT IANA). E.g.: SE Asia Standard Time, UTC, Singapore Standard Time, Pacific Standard Time.

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager (own brand).

**Partial update (PATCH):** Only fields included in the form are applied. Omitted fields retain their current values.

**Logo behavior:** If a new logo file is uploaded, the old logo file is deleted in the background after DB commit succeeds.

**403:** Role mismatch or not own brand.
**422:** New name conflicts with another existing brand.

response.name: 200 OK
403 Forbidden

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.

**Soft delete.** Brand must have no related:
- Stores
- Subscriptions
- Users
- Tracks

→ If any exist, returns 400/422 with a descriptive message.

response.name: 200 OK
422 Has Related Stores
403 Forbidden
404 Not Found

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.

Reassigns Brand.PrimaryOwnerId to a new BrandManager in the same brand.

**Rules:** newOwnerId must be an active BrandManager in the same brand and must not already be PrimaryOwner.

**422:** Business rule violation. **404:** Brand not found. **403:** Not SystemAdmin.

response.name: 200 OK
422 New Owner Not Valid
403 Forbidden
404 Not Found

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.

Toggles brand status: Active <-> Inactive.

**No request body required.**

**404:** Brand not found. **403:** Not SystemAdmin.

response.name: 200 OK - Active to Inactive
response.body: {"isSuccess": true, "message": "Brand status has been updated successfully", "errors": null, "errorCode": null}

response.name: 200 OK - Inactive to Active
response.body: {"isSuccess": true, "message": "Brand status has been updated successfully", "errors": null, "errorCode": null}

response.name: 401 Unauthorized
response.body: {"isSuccess": false, "message": "Unauthorized", "errors": null, "errorCode": "Unauthorized"}

response.name: 403 Forbidden
response.body: {"isSuccess": false, "message": "You do not have permission to access this resource", "errors": null, "errorCode": "Forbidden"}

response.name: 404 Not Found
response.body: {"isSuccess": false, "message": "Brand not found", "errors": null, "errorCode": "NotFound"}

item.name: Users
item.description:
User management endpoints for Log.AI-CAMS CMS. Base path: /api/users

**Auth roles:**
- SystemAdmin (0): Full access to all endpoints
- BrandManager (1): Limited access — own brand only
- StoreManager (2): No access to any user management endpoint

query.description: Search across email, first/last name, phone
Filter by brand Guid (SA only; BM auto-forced to own brand)

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager.
SA sees all users. BM sees only users in their own brand. SM returns 403.

formdata.description: Required. Valid email. Must be unique.
Required for BM/SM. Must be null for SA.
Required for SM. Must be null for SA/BM.

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager.
**Content-Type:** multipart/form-data.
Role rules: SA → no brandId/storeId. BM → brandId required. SM → brandId+storeId required.
Only PrimaryOwner or SA can create BrandManager.

response.name: 201 Created
400 Validation Failed
403 Forbidden
422 Email Already Exists

formdata.description: Optional. Valid email. Must be unique.
Optional. Valid phone. Must be unique.

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager.
Partial update — only enable fields you want to change.
BM cannot update self, cross-brand users, or other BMs.
**403:** BM updating self or cross-brand. **422:** Duplicate email/phone.

response.name: 200 OK
403 Forbidden (BM updating self)
422 Email Duplicate

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager. No request body.
Toggles Active↔Inactive. Cannot toggle self, SA accounts, or PrimaryOwner accounts.

response.name: 200 OK
403 Cannot Toggle SystemAdmin
403 Cannot Toggle Self
404 Not Found

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager.
Admin-initiated reset — no current password required.
BM can only reset StoreManagers in their own brand. Cannot reset BM or SA accounts.

response.name: 200 OK
400 Validation Failed
403 Forbidden (BM resets BM)
404 Not Found

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin only.
Moves user to a different brand — clears storeId and revokes all active sessions of the target user.
Cannot reassign self, SA accounts, or PrimaryOwner (transfer ownership first).

response.name: 200 OK
403 Forbidden (Not SA)
422 User Already In Brand
422 PrimaryOwner Guard
404 Brand Not Found

request.description:
**Auth:** SystemAdmin, BrandManager.
Assign or unassign store. Send `{ "newStoreId": null }` to unassign.
Store must belong to same brand as user. BM role cannot be assigned to a store.
Revokes all active sessions of the target user on success.

response.name: 200 OK (Assign)
200 OK (Unassign)
403 Forbidden (PrimaryOwner)
422 BrandManager Cannot Have Store
422 Store Different Brand
404 Store Not Found

item.name: Stores
item.description:
Store Management API — CMS (React & Flutter). Base path: /api/stores

Auth roles:
- SystemAdmin (0): Read-only (GET only)
- BrandManager (1): Full access to own brand's stores
- StoreManager (2): GET /api/stores/{id} (own store only)

See: docs/stores/API_Stores.md

query.description: Full-text search on name, address, city, district, contactNumber
⚠️ SystemAdmin only — BrandManager value is always overridden by handler
Filter stores created from this date (ISO 8601)
Filter stores created up to this date (ISO 8601)
Partial match on Store Manager first/last name or email

request.description:
Get paginated list of stores.

Auth: SystemAdmin ✅, BrandManager (own brand) ✅, StoreManager ❌

Notes:
- BrandManager: brandId query param is always overridden to their own brand.
- SystemAdmin: can pass brandId to filter by a specific brand.

response.name: 200 OK — Store list
response.body:
{
  "currentPage": 1,
  "pageSize": 10,
  "totalItems": 2,
  "totalPages": 1,
  "hasPrevious": false,
  "hasNext": false,
  "items": [
    {
      "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",

      "updatedBy": null,
      "status": 1
    }
  ],
  "isSuccess": true,
  "message": "Store retrieved successfully",
  "errors": null,
  "errorCode": null
}

response.name: 401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (StoreManager not allowed)

request.description:
Get store detail by ID.

Auth: SystemAdmin ✅, BrandManager (own brand) ✅, StoreManager (own store only) ✅

Authorization:
- BrandManager: 403 if store.BrandId != user.BrandId
- StoreManager: 403 if store.Id != user.StoreId

request.description:
Create a new store.

Auth: BrandManager only ✅ (SystemAdmin ❌, StoreManager ❌)

Notes:
- brandId is NOT in the request body — always inferred from the authenticated BrandManager's session.
- firestoreCollectionPath is NOT in the request body — managed by AI/IoT pipeline (read-only).
- If timeZone is omitted, it is inherited from the brand's DefaultTimeZone.
- name must be unique within the brand.
- contactNumber (if provided) must be unique within the brand.

response.name: 200 OK — Store created
400 Validation Failed — name required
400 Validation Failed — invalid phone
400 Validation Failed — invalid timezone
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (not BrandManager)
404 Not Found (Brand not found)
422 Business Rule — Name already exists

request.description:
Update store fields (partial update / patch semantics).

Auth: BrandManager only ✅ (SystemAdmin ❌, StoreManager ❌)

Notes:
- Only send fields you want to change. Omitted/null fields keep their current value.
- brandId is NOT in the request body — handler enforces brand ownership.
- Name and ContactNumber uniqueness is checked only if their values actually change.
- timeZone: IANA timezone ID if updating (e.g. "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh").

response.name: 200 OK — Store updated
400 Validation Failed
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (wrong brand)
404 Not Found
422 Business Rule — ContactNumber conflict

request.description:
Soft-delete a store.

Auth: BrandManager only ✅ (SystemAdmin ❌, StoreManager ❌)

Business Rules:
- FAILS (422) if any user is assigned to this store.
- FAILS (422) if any active Space belongs to this store.

response.name: 200 OK — Store deleted
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (wrong brand)
404 Not Found
422 Business Rule — Has assigned users
422 Business Rule — Has active spaces

request.description:
Toggle store status: Active ↔ Inactive.

Auth: BrandManager only ✅ (SystemAdmin ❌, StoreManager ❌)

Notes:
- No request body required.
- BrandManager can only toggle stores belonging to their own brand.
- Active → Inactive, Inactive → Active.

response.name: 200 OK — Status toggled
401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (wrong brand)
404 Not Found

item.name: Spaces
item.description:
Space Management API — CMS (React & Flutter)

Base path: /api/spaces
SpaceTypeEnum: 1=Counter, 2=Hall, 3=Entrance, 4=Outdoor, 5=Kitchen, 6=Restroom

Auth matrix:
- SA (SystemAdmin): ReadList ✅, ReadDetail ✅, Create ❌, Update ❌, Delete ❌, ToggleStatus ❌
- BM (BrandManager): All ✅ (own brand only)
- SM (StoreManager): All ✅ (own store only; null storeId → 403 on writes)

See: docs/spaces/API_Spaces.md

response.name: 200 OK — Space list
response.body:
{
  "currentPage": 1,
  "pageSize": 10,
  "totalItems": 1,
  "totalPages": 1,
  "items": [

      "storeId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
      "name": "Counter Area A",
      "type": 1,
      "description": "Main counter serving area",
      "status": 1
    }
  ],
  "isSuccess": true,
  "message": "Space retrieved successfully"
}

response.name: 401 Unauthorized
403 Forbidden (SM with null storeId)
